articles.title: King Leak Photos: SRK & Deepika's New Bollywood 2025 Drama
articles.what_this_means: Director Siddharth Anand issued a formal warning after leaked set photos from King (starring Shah Rukh Khan and Deepika Padukone) went viral on social media. The new Bollywood 2025 action-drama filmed in Cape Town sparked massive fan excitement, but the filmmakers are urging audiences to respect the creative process and stop sharing unauthorized content. Theatrical release expected late 2025/early 2026, with streaming to follow on Prime Video or Hotstar.

articles.title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Rahul Leads Scoring Race
articles.what_this_means: KL Rahul dominates IPL 2026's Orange Cap with commanding run-scoring, while Jofra Archer has climbed to No. 2 on the Purple Cap table. Both stars are delivering match-changing performances as the tournament heats up. Here's how to catch all the action from the US.

articles.title: EB-2 India June 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Modest Movement Expected
articles.what_this_means: EB-2 India is predicted to move forward by 13-28 days in June 2026, with the most likely outcome being approximately 18 days forward to August 2, 2014. Retrogression risk remains very low at this point in the fiscal year, though applicants should remain cautious as the traditionally volatile July-September period approaches.

articles.title: Ek Din Now in Theatres: Junaid Khan & Sai Pallavi's Romantic Drama
articles.what_this_means: Ek Din, starring Junaid Khan and Sai Pallavi in their first on-screen pairing, is now playing in US theatres. This soft romantic drama from Aamir Khan Productions offers authentic storytelling and earned recognition during special promotional theatre visits. Streaming details coming soon.
